title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people sharing their ambitions and how they are working towards them. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Mia, 24, Medical Student
[43]I’ve wanted to be a doctor since I was a child[/43]. It’s a long road, but I’m determined. [47]I volunteer at a hospital to gain experience[/47]. [50]Sometimes, I worry about balancing work and personal life in the future[/50].
texts.D:
### Ethan, 29, Entrepreneur
[44]My ambition is to start my own tech company[/44]. I’m saving money and learning as much as I can. [48]I attend networking events to meet potential partners[/48]. [51]I know there will be setbacks, but I’m ready to face them[/51].
texts.B:
### Zoe, 27, Artist
[45]I dream of having my own art exhibition one day[/45]. I work on my portfolio every week. [49]I take online courses to improve my skills[/49]. [52]I believe persistence is the key to achieving my goals[/52].
texts.C:
### Lucas, 35, Teacher
[46]I want to write a book about education[/46]. I’ve started drafting chapters in my free time. [47]Sharing ideas with colleagues inspires me[/47]. [49]I hope my work will help others in the future[/49].

questions.question: has had the same career goal since childhood?
questions.explanation: Mia has wanted to be a doctor since she was a child.

questions.question: is working towards starting a business?
questions.explanation: Ethan’s ambition is to start his own tech company.

questions.question: hopes to display their work in a public setting?
questions.explanation: Zoe dreams of having her own art exhibition.

questions.question: is writing a book in their spare time?
questions.explanation: Lucas is drafting chapters for a book about education.

questions.question: gains inspiration from helping others or sharing ideas?
questions.explanation: Mia volunteers at a hospital to gain experience.

questions.question: attends events to make useful contacts?
questions.explanation: Ethan attends networking events to meet partners.

questions.question: is actively improving their skills through courses?
questions.explanation: Zoe takes online courses to improve her skills.

questions.question: is concerned about maintaining a work-life balance?
questions.explanation: Mia worries about balancing work and personal life.

questions.question: expects to face difficulties but is prepared for them?
questions.explanation: Ethan is ready to face setbacks.

questions.question: believes determination is essential for success?
questions.explanation: Zoe believes persistence is key to achieving goals.
